title: Modular SNR8503M Firmware — Hall + Sensorless + Pluggable Protocols
summary: Refactor SNR8503M_gcc_full into a modular firmware where motor sensing (Hall, Sensorless, or both) and protocol layer (simple, binary, full=binary+ASCII) can each be selected at compile time via build profiles. A single build switch yields any of the supported configurations without touching source files.

motor_sensorless.purpose: BEMF-comparator sensorless commutation (no Hall sensors needed)
sources_to_add: src/COMP_Sensoeless.c (copy from sensorless SDK — vendor's typo preserved)
src/sensorless_drive.c (new — wraps the open-source calls into our state machine)
motor_sensorless.closed_lib: vendor_libs/snr_bldc_snls_renamed.lib (228 B — BLDC_init_snls, COMP_Motor_Zero_Detect, Freerun_Zero_Detect; renamed via objcopy to avoid BLDC_init clash with Hall lib)
motor_sensorless.notes: Can coexist with motor_hall — runtime detection chooses; or compile-time only-one-of

protocol_simple.purpose: Original 9-byte AA...55 frame protocol from vendor SDK (UR_Ctrl.c)
sources: src/UR_Ctrl.c (already present — currently bypassed in Phase 3.5)
protocol_simple.wire_format: 0xAA SpdHi SpdLo PwrHi PwrLo Rsv Rsv CKM 0x55 (9-byte frames; vendor's stub)
protocol_simple.ram_cost_bytes: 256 (rxd_comm0 ring buffer — shared with bipropellant if both enabled, but they cannot coexist)
protocol_simple.notes: Smallest protocol option. Use when host is a simple microcontroller without bipropellant library.

protocol_bipropellant_binary.purpose: Bipropellant binary protocol (COBS-R framed, parameter registry, subscriptions)
sources: src/protocol_params_*.c (registers parameter codes — see protocol_codes module below)
protocol_bipropellant_binary.wire_format: PROTOCOL_MSG3: SOM + cmd + CI + len + COBS-R-encoded payload
protocol_bipropellant_binary.ram_cost_bytes: ~9600 B (PROTOCOL_STAT struct with 10 subscriptions + 256-entry param array)
protocol_bipropellant_binary.notes: Required for any of the protocol_params_* modules below.

protocol_bipropellant_ascii.purpose: ASCII variant of bipropellant on the same UART — terminal debugging convenience
protocol_bipropellant_ascii.wire_format: ASCII commands like 'R08' for READ code 0x08, 'W09 01' for WRITE; coexists with binary on the same serial line
protocol_bipropellant_ascii.notes: If MODULE_PROTOCOL_BIPROPELLANT_ASCII=1 but BIN=0, the build script will force BIN=1 with a warning.

module_flash_config.flash_cost_bytes: ~1800 B + 4 KB reserved Flash sector for config block

hall_minimal.description: Hall sensored BLDC + original 9-byte protocol. Smallest footprint.
hall_minimal.use_case: Direct replacement for the original vendor firmware; minimal binary

hall_bipropellant.description: Hall + bipropellant binary protocol + all standard codes (matches current SNR8503M_gcc Phase 6.1 baseline)

hall_bipropellant_full.description: Hall + full bipropellant (binary+ASCII) + all hoverboard-standard codes (matches current SNR8503M_gcc_full Phase 8 baseline)

sensorless_minimal.description: Sensorless BEMF + simple protocol. Drop-in for boards without Hall sensors.

unified_minimal.description: Hall + Sensorless with auto-detection + simple protocol

unified_full.description: Everything — Hall + Sensorless + binary + ASCII + all codes + flash config
unified_full.warning: MAY EXCEED 32 KB MDK-Lite cap. GCC build (no cap) recommended for this profile.

constraints.compile_time_check:
#if !MODULE_MOTOR_HALL && !MODULE_MOTOR_SENSORLESS
#error "At least one motor sensing module must be enabled"
#endif

#if MODULE_PROTOCOL_SIMPLE && (MODULE_PROTOCOL_BIPROPELLANT_BIN || MODULE_PROTOCOL_BIPROPELLANT_ASCII)
#error "Simple and bipropellant protocols are mutually exclusive — both share UART0"
#endif

constraints.auto_fix: If MODULE_PROTOCOL_BIPROPELLANT_ASCII=1 but BIN=0, build script forces BIN=1 with warning

constraints.rationale: Position PI loop reads gains from g_flash_cfg; engages MODE_POSITION via control_mode dispatch

feature_config_design.selection_method: Either: (a) edit feature_config.h directly to set module flags, OR (b) pass PROFILE=name to build.sh which selects from profiles dict and generates the file
feature_config_design.preferred_method: b — profile-driven generation; reproducible and self-documenting
feature_config_design.c_code_skeleton:
/* AUTO-GENERATED by build.sh from PROFILE setting. Do not edit. */
#ifndef FEATURE_CONFIG_H
#define FEATURE_CONFIG_H

/* Motor sensing */
#define MODULE_MOTOR_HALL                 1
#define MODULE_MOTOR_SENSORLESS           1

/* Protocol family — mutually exclusive groups */
#define MODULE_PROTOCOL_SIMPLE            0
#define MODULE_PROTOCOL_BIPROPELLANT_BIN  1
#define MODULE_PROTOCOL_BIPROPELLANT_ASCII 1

/* Protocol code modules — require bipropellant binary */
#define MODULE_CODES_STANDARD             1
#define MODULE_CODES_SNR                  1
#define MODULE_CODES_POSITION             1
#define MODULE_CODES_MOTION               1
#define MODULE_CODES_POSCTRL              1

/* Support modules */
#define MODULE_FLASH_CONFIG               1

/* Compile-time validation (see constraints section in plan) */
#if !MODULE_MOTOR_HALL && !MODULE_MOTOR_SENSORLESS
#error "At least one motor sensing module must be enabled"
#endif

#if MODULE_PROTOCOL_SIMPLE && (MODULE_PROTOCOL_BIPROPELLANT_BIN || MODULE_PROTOCOL_BIPROPELLANT_ASCII)
#error "Simple and bipropellant protocols are mutually exclusive"
#endif

#if MODULE_PROTOCOL_BIPROPELLANT_ASCII && !MODULE_PROTOCOL_BIPROPELLANT_BIN
#error "ASCII protocol requires binary protocol"
#endif

#endif

build_sh_additions: Accept PROFILE=name argument (default: hall_bipropellant_full to match current state)
Generate include/feature_config.h from the selected profile
Conditionally include source files in SRCS_C based on module flags (faster builds when modules disabled — alternative is rely on linker --gc-sections)
Pass -DMODULE_X=value flags to gcc so #if guards work consistently
Emit a summary at start of build: 'Profile: hall_bipropellant_full | Motor: HALL+SENSORLESS | Protocol: BIN+ASCII | Codes: STD+SNR+POS+MOTION+POSCTRL | Flash config: yes'

wrap_existing_files_with_guards: src/UR_Ctrl.c — wrap UART0_init, UartDealRX, UartDealTX, fputc bodies in #if MODULE_PROTOCOL_SIMPLE || MODULE_PROTOCOL_BIPROPELLANT_BIN (most of this file is shared infrastructure; keep init+send always available since both protocols use them)
src/protocol_handlers.c — entire file already #if-gated; replace UART0_FUNCTION check with #if MODULE_PROTOCOL_BIPROPELLANT_BIN
src/protocol_params_*.c — each entire file gated on its corresponding MODULE_CODES_* flag
src/control_mode.c — gated on MODULE_CODES_MOTION (only needed when motion commands present)
src/M1_StateMachine.c — sub-state handler bodies use #if/#elif MODULE_MOTOR_HALL/MODULE_MOTOR_SENSORLESS to pick commutation path
src/interrupt.c — HALL_IRQHandler body wrapped in #if MODULE_MOTOR_HALL; CMP_IRQHandler body wrapped in #if MODULE_MOTOR_SENSORLESS
src/hardware_init.c — Hall peripheral init #if MODULE_MOTOR_HALL; CMP init #if MODULE_MOTOR_SENSORLESS (both are cheap; could leave always-init for simplicity)
source_refactor_required.lines_changed_estimate: ~200 lines across ~12 files, mostly mechanical #if additions

steps.action: Create include/feature_config.h with all module flags + compile-time validation #ifs. Default profile = hall_bipropellant_full (matches current state).
steps.verify: File exists, compiles standalone with arm-none-eabi-gcc -E

steps.action: Modify build.sh: accept PROFILE=name; have a bash associative array mapping profile names to MODULE_* values; generate feature_config.h on each build.
steps.verify: ./build.sh build PROFILE=hall_minimal generates a feature_config.h with sensorless and bipropellant disabled. Build still passes (no source uses the flags yet).

steps.action: Add #include "feature_config.h" to MC_Parameter.h (so it propagates everywhere) at the top.
steps.verify: Every .c file now sees the MODULE_* flags via the existing include graph

steps.action: Print build summary at top of build output: profile name + enabled modules + estimated size.
steps.verify: Build shows 'Profile: ... | Modules: ...' line

phases.title: Refactor existing code into modules (no behavior change for current profile)

steps.action: Wrap protocol_handlers.c, all protocol_params_*.c, flash_config.c, control_mode.c, position_control.c in their respective #if MODULE_* guards.
steps.verify: Build with hall_bipropellant_full profile — text size identical to pre-refactor (within ±50 bytes from include changes)

steps.action: In main.c, replace the UART0_FUNCTION check around UartDealRX/protocol_drain_rx with module-aware #if/#elif chain.
steps.verify: Build with PROFILE=hall_minimal succeeds and uses the simple protocol path; PROFILE=hall_bipropellant_full uses protocol_drain_rx

steps.action: Test 3 profiles end-to-end (build only): hall_minimal, hall_bipropellant_full, hall_bipropellant. Verify each produces a valid HEX.
steps.verify: Three build outputs, all valid hex, three different sizes matching profile estimates ±10%

steps.action: Update STATUS.md and BUILD_LOG.md with the refactor delta
steps.verify: Status reflects MODULE_* flag support

steps.action: Copy sensorless SDK files into the gcc tree, gated by #if MODULE_MOTOR_SENSORLESS at top of each .c file.
steps.verify: Files present; with PROFILE that excludes sensorless they compile to empty .o (sections stripped)

steps.action: Add lib-rename step to build.sh: if MODULE_MOTOR_SENSORLESS=1, run arm-none-eabi-objcopy --redefine-sym BLDC_init=BLDC_init_snls vendor_libs/SNR_BLDC_SNLS_V1p0.lib vendor_libs/snr_bldc_snls_renamed.lib. Conditionally add the renamed lib to link line.
steps.verify: Build with unified_minimal profile produces hex; map shows both BLDC_init AND BLDC_init_snls symbols

phases.title: Motor-mode dispatch + auto-detection
phases.autonomy: autonomous_safe (no behavior change in single-mode profiles)

steps.action: Create src/motor_mode.c + include/motor_mode.h. Defines motor_mode_t {MODE_HALL, MODE_SENSORLESS}, global g_motor_mode, motor_mode_detect() that samples Hall pins for ~50ms.
steps.verify: Build passes for all profiles; g_motor_mode symbol present when at least one motor module enabled

steps.action: Wire motor_mode_detect() into main.c after Hardware_init. Skip detection if only one motor module is compiled in (no choice to make).
steps.verify: PROFILE=hall_bipropellant_full hardcodes MODE_HALL; PROFILE=unified_full runs detection

steps.action: Add new flash-backed codes 0xB0 (motor_mode_active R), 0xB1 (override RW), 0xB2 (detection window RW). Gated on MODULE_MOTOR_SENSORLESS (no override needed if only one motor compiled).
steps.verify: Codes registered when MODULE_MOTOR_SENSORLESS=1 AND MODULE_FLASH_CONFIG=1

phases.title: State machine dispatch on g_motor_mode (SUPERVISED hardware testing)
phases.risk: high — sub-state handlers branch; bugs cause incorrect commutation

steps.action: Edit src/M1_StateMachine.c — each M1M1_Run* sub-state function gets #if MODULE_MOTOR_HALL / #elif MODULE_MOTOR_SENSORLESS branches. If both compiled, runtime branch on g_motor_mode.
steps.verify: Build for hall_bipropellant_full — Hall path identical to pre-Phase-13. Build for sensorless_bipropellant — sensorless path active.

steps.action: Add CMP_IRQHandler in interrupt.c gated on MODULE_MOTOR_SENSORLESS. Dispatches to COMP_Motor_Zero_Detect when in MODE_SENSORLESS.
steps.verify: Build clean; vector table has CMP_IRQHandler when sensorless enabled

steps.action: Add sensorless tuning constants to MC_Parameter.h: STARTUP_OPENLOOP_DUTY, STARTUP_RAMP_TIME_MS, SWITCHOVER_eRPM, BEMF_FILTER_TIME (gated on MODULE_MOTOR_SENSORLESS so they don't pollute Hall-only builds).
steps.verify: Defines compile cleanly

steps.action: HARDWARE TEST — flash unified_full profile. Disconnect Hall sensors → verify 0xB0 reads MODE_SENSORLESS, motor self-starts. Reconnect Hall → reboot → verify 0xB0 reads MODE_HALL, motor uses Hall path.
steps.verify: Manual; motor spins in both modes

steps.action: Add diagnostic counter 0xB3 (bemf_zero_crossings) gated on MODULE_MOTOR_SENSORLESS
steps.verify: Counter increments visibly when sensorless motor spins

steps.action: Handle freerun-against-wind: if motor was spinning before power-on, sensorless detection should join the rotation
steps.verify: Manual spin before boot; verify firmware doesn't fight

steps.action: Reject mid-run mode switches. Writes to 0xB1 while motor is energised are deferred to next boot.
steps.verify: Write 0xB1=2 while motor running; mode stays MODE_HALL

phases.title: Protocol module split — make simple/binary/ASCII independently selectable

steps.action: In third_party/bipropellant-protocol/, add #if MODULE_PROTOCOL_BIPROPELLANT_ASCII / #endif around the body of ascii_protocol.c so it compiles to empty when ASCII disabled.
steps.verify: Build PROFILE=hall_bipropellant (no ASCII) — text smaller by ~3 KB

steps.action: Confirm protocol_simple build path. With PROFILE=hall_minimal, the existing UR_Ctrl.c::UartDealRX/TX should be wired in by Phase 10.2 and the bipropellant files compile to empty TUs.
steps.verify: PROFILE=hall_minimal builds a ~12 KB firmware that responds to the 9-byte AA...55 frame protocol

steps.action: Document the profile catalog in docs/profiles.md — each profile, its modules, footprint, intended host.
steps.verify: File exists with all 7 profiles listed

estimates.phase_13_dispatch: 4 hours coding + 2-4 hr supervised hw test

risks.risk: Module flag drift — guard placement inconsistent across files
risks.mitigation: Linting: grep -nE '^#if MODULE_' src/ include/ to audit guard coverage; build all 7 profiles in CI
objcopy --redefine-sym in build.sh; covered in Phase 11.2
Manual override via 0xB1; documented detection algorithm

risks.risk: Sensorless startup may damage hardware if STARTUP_OPENLOOP_DUTY too high
risks.mitigation: Conservative default; add safety check on current limit during align

risks.risk: Profile sprawl — too many configurations to verify
risks.mitigation: Limit to the 7 documented profiles; ad-hoc combinations remain possible via edit feature_config.h directly

risks.risk: Existing Phase 8 build size grows after refactor due to module-flag overhead
risks.mitigation: Use --gc-sections; check that hall_bipropellant_full size stays within ±100 bytes of pre-Phase-9 size

deliverable_branch.suggested_path: C:\RC\SNR8503M_gcc_full (in-place — this is the chosen branch)
deliverable_branch.rationale: User explicitly chose SNR8503M_gcc_full. Original SNR8503M_gcc remains as Phase 6.1 fallback. After Phase 15, _gcc_full will be the modular flagship.
deliverable_branch.post_implementation: Single source tree that builds 7 different firmware images via PROFILE= flag. Default = unified_full (or hall_bipropellant_full to preserve Phase 8 baseline behavior).

self_loop_compatibility.phase_13_supervised: Mark BLOCKED needs_supervised_test before each substep
self_loop_compatibility.loop_exit_rule: Same as before — current_phase >= 13 stops the loop; user explicitly resumes per-step

notes: This v2 plan supersedes v1 (which only covered Hall+Sensorless integration without module abstraction).
v1 phases 9-12 are renumbered into v2 phases 11-14 (sensorless absorption + dispatch).
Phase 9-10 (NEW) make the existing Phase 1-8 code modular without changing behavior — current build profile becomes 'hall_bipropellant_full'.
Phase 15 (NEW) splits the protocol layer into selectable modules.
After all 15 phases, the firmware tree builds any of the 7 documented profiles with a single PROFILE= flag.
Compile-time mutual-exclusion checks prevent invalid combinations (e.g., simple + bipropellant).
The MDK-Lite 32 KB cap is only relevant for Keil builds; GCC has no such cap. Unified_full profile (~33 KB) exceeds MDK-Lite but is fine for GCC.
Module flags propagate via feature_config.h being included at the top of MC_Parameter.h — every existing file already includes MC_Parameter.h transitively.
The 'always-on' baseline (peripheral drivers, state machine core, protection, scheduler) is NOT module-gated — those are always compiled.
